title: Core builder certificate
excerpt: I just completed the core builder certification program with a final exam score of 85.30 which it had said was the minimum score needed to pass. Upon completion it says the path is complete, but there’s no actual Core Bu…

posts.author: ldscott716 (Lydia Scott)
posts.cookedHtml: I just completed the core builder certification program with a final exam score of 85.30 which it had said was the minimum score needed to pass. Upon completion it says the path is complete, but there’s no actual Core Builder Certificate issued like there was with the badge certificates. Is that something that will be issued soon?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ldscott716!

Would you be happy to send me a private message via community with your email? I will chase this up for you

posts.author: DevonB (Devon Bowen)
posts.cookedHtml: Same issue here. Did the Monday team ever get you your certificate?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Devon! I can look into this for you! Are you able to send over a direct message with your email?

posts.author: floreksa (Sarah Florek)
posts.cookedHtml: I had the same experience today. Just passed with a 90%.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking into this for you Sarah

posts.author: floreksa (Sarah Florek)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

I ended up receiving an email with the certificate a couple of hours later. I think if that is the process for the final certificate it should state that on the final page. That would clear up a lot of confusion, since you receive all the other certificates immediately.

Sarah

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I appreciate the update Sarah and your feedback! The team have clarified that the certificate can take some time to generate and send, and I will request that this is stated from the outset. Please let me know if you run into any further problems
